questionHtml: Outline, using (b)(i), why it is not correct to use the equation 2G×mass of Ioradius of Io to calculate the speed required for the spacecraft to reach infinity from the surface of Io.
markschemeHtml:
«this is the escape speed for Io alone but» gravitational potential / field of Jupiter must be taken into account  ✓


OWTTE
